steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject is “Alexander's use of 'we'” — a singular noun phrase where “use” is the head noun.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A singular subject requires a singular verb in the present tense, and choice A (evokes) is the only singular form. Choices B, C, and D violate subject-verb agreement by using plural forms. That matches choice A — A is correct.
